Description: Implement a utility to convert lat/lon coordinates into human-readable city names using the Google Maps Geocoding API.
Refactor AIVisionService to use Gemini to analyze telemetry and Imagen 3 to generate thematic procedural textures.
Implement the ControlTowerAgent in services/control_tower.py using Vertex AI ADK to respond to local time inquiries.
Implement the CopilotAgent in services/control_tower.py to handle cockpit interactions and directly invoke the ADK runner.
